Subject:
// FIRM ENQUIRY // ACCT : OMPL OR NOM // BF PIG IRON, 20,000 MT +/- 10% MOLOO // PARADIP - SRI RACHA // LAYCAN : 05 - 15 FEB\'26
Good Day !
KIND ATTN : CHARTERING DESK
//
Reverse Auction for same shall be conducted
tomorrow i.e. 9
th
January 2026 from 1500 - 1600 Hrs IST
in Ariba Platform and we solicit your active participation:-
ACCT : ORISSA METALIKS PVT LTD OR GUARANTEED NOMINEE
CARGO & QUANTITY: 20,000 MT +/- 10% MOLOO BF PIG IRON IN BULK
LAYCAN : 5 - 15 FEB 2026 (TO BE NARROWED DOWN TO 7 DAYS IN CHOPT)
LOAD PORT: 1/2 SBS 1 SP PICT, PARADIP, ECI
DISCHARGE PORT: 1/2 SAS 1/2 SBS 1 SP SRI RACHA HARBOUR, THAILAND
LOAD RATE: 6000 MTS PWWD SHINC
DISCHARGE RATE: CQD FO
NIL ADD.COMM + 1.25% BROKERAGE TO OCEAN REAPER MARITIME
START BID : USD 21 PMT
DECREMENT : 05 CENTS
DEMMURAGE RATE : PLEASE ADVISE
ALL BIDDERS TO INTIMATE OF PARTICIPATION OVER EMAIL LATEST BY 1445 HRS IST TOMORROW ALONGWITH THE LOWEST POSSIBLE DEMURRAGE RATE.
ALL BIDDERS TO ENSURE THAT THE OFFERS ARE VALID TILL 1800 HRS INDIA TIME ON 10.01.2026 AFTER CLOSURE OF THE AUCTION.
OWNERS TO CHECK PORT RESTICTIONS / REGULATIONS BENDS.
OWNERS/OPERATORS TO SHARE TC DESCRIPTION OF THE PERFORMING VESSEL WHILE NOMINATING SAME.
THE ATTACHED CHRTR\'S STANDARD TERMS & CONDITIONS TO BE COMPLIED STRICTLY WITH LOGICAL AMENDMENTS ONLY, WITHOUT RELEVANCE TO ANY PREVIOUSLY CONCLUDED CP & ALSO
ALL SUBJECTS TO BE LIFTED WITHIN 1 WORKING DAY BY COB INDIA TIME AFTER ENTERING ON SUBJECTS. (BY COB IST ON 12.01.26)
OFFERS NOT IN LINE WITH CHRTR\'S STANDARD TERMS & CONDITION MAY BE REJECTED.
CHRTRS IN THEIR SOLE DISCRETION CAN CANCEL THE RA IF THE TARGET FREIGHT AND DEMURRAGE RATES ARE NOT ACHIEVED OR CAN GO FOR A POST RA FREIGHT AND DEMURRAGE MATCHING/NEGOTIATION SESSION.
//
KIND REGARDS,
Ms KAVITA JANTWAL
